name: io.github.aradar46/reuse-before-generate
title: Reuse Before Generate
description: Checks for reusable projects and competing products before your agent builds. Searches repositories, registries, launch feeds, and the web.

environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional GitHub token. Raises the search rate limit from 10 requests/minute to 30.

environmentVariables.name: TAVILY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Tavily API key. Adds bounded web discovery for reusable projects and competing products.
